title: Comparison of $4,000 boutique audio cable to $7 Amazon Basics cable shows audiophiles waste a lot of money — scientific audio equipment analysis with analyzer shows no difference in quality
summary: Those upgraded audio cables probably won't take your music listening pleasure up to the next level. All you need are the basics, literally.

title: أسطورة بايرن ميونخ: نفخر بوجود هاري كين معنا.. ولا نعلم متى سيأتي سعودي ليستثمر فيه

title: Apple discontinues the Mac Pro after twenty years
summary: Apple has discontinued the Mac Pro. The venerable desktop computer had a twenty-year run and served as the flagship model in the company's lineup for most of its lifetime.
